team_name: TenderSense — AI-Powered Tender Eligibility Extraction & Evaluation Engine
summary: Design a technical platform that uses AI to extract and evaluate eligibility criteria from government procurement tenders in India, reducing evaluation time, eliminating subjective interpretation, and creating a corruption-resistant process.
key_steps: NLP pipeline for eligibility criteria identification
Dashboard display of results with audit trail
optimization_claims: Reducing tender evaluation time from days to minutes
constraints_addressed: Human error or bias in eligibility evaluation
